originalTitle: Reinforcement learning research with Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Self-Play Robustness with Exploiter Agents and Hyperparameter Sweeps in RoboCode
summary: Tested historical self-play and exploiter agents on the RoboCode benchmark to achieve robust policy diversity. Found that exploiter agents failed to improve held-out performance, leading to a new approach using hyperparameter sweeps to generate diverse opponent policies.
